component.name: Linux Whisper
component.summary: Local, privacy-focused speech-to-text transcription and dictation

description.p: Linux Whisper is a local, privacy-focused dictation and transcription application for Linux. It uses OpenAI's Whisper models running entirely on your device — no data ever leaves your machine.

ul.li: Audio file transcription (WAV, MP3, OGG, M4A, FLAC, Opus)
Multiple Whisper model sizes from Tiny to Large
Export to TXT, SRT, VTT, and CSV formats
Native GTK4/libadwaita interface following GNOME HIG

description.p: Website restyled with accordion sections, README with pigeon icon and badges, .deb build fix, i18n test stability fix. Security audit, SHA-256 model integrity verification, CI/CD supply chain hardening.

Geometric pigeon tray icon with recording glow, audio file transcription window, export to TXT/SRT/VTT/CSV, single-instance enforcement, preferences UI improvements, enhanced website with multi-distro install guides.
Global hotkey dictation, auto-paste via wtype, model management, system tray integration.
